title: Steam / Early Access planning (Tier B)
description: Planning-only milestones: no application code nodes. Start after Tier A Definition of Done from demo-vertical-slice (playable zip + automated tests + manual combat→map smoke), or run asset tasks in parallel only when they do not block the slice. Godot depot/build proofs layer on godot-steam-build + KyndeBlade_Godot/STEAM_BUILD.md. Expand milestones with .tdad/prompts/plan-steam-milestones.md. Store plumbing (Steamworks, depots, pricing) stays in human checklists—do not pretend milestones are single Unity features.

nodes.title: Scope lock for EA
nodes.description: Exit: written scope for Early Access (systems, content depth, known gaps vs demo). Risks and cut line documented. Depends on Tier A proving core loop.

nodes.title: Store page and capsule art
nodes.description: Exit: Steam store page draft (short description, tags), capsule / header / library art at required resolutions, age/content questionnaire started.

nodes.title: Trailer and screenshots
nodes.description: Exit: trailer cut (or placeholder plan), 5+ in-game screenshots matching current build, no misleading capture.

nodes.title: Depots and build branches
nodes.description: Exit: Steam depots configured for chosen OS targets; build pipeline or manual recipe from Unity and/or Godot export (see godot-steam-build + STEAM_BUILD.md); version labeling; smoke install from depot on a clean machine.

nodes.title: Playtest wave
nodes.description: Exit: external playtesters run Tier A path + one stretch path; feedback triaged; P0 blockers fixed or scoped out with store messaging.

nodes.title: Pricing and release window
nodes.description: Exit: regional pricing draft, EA vs 1.0 messaging, release date or Coming Soon with wishlist CTA; legal/FAQ if needed.
